answer_includes_unnecessary_comment: Added commentary (e.g., 'no new test needed') that was not part of the required answer.
answer_format_wrong_type_string_instead_: Returned the age as a string instead of a numeric type as expected.
answer_format_missing_prefix: Returned raw value/date string without the required descriptive prefix.
missing_resource_query_before_answer: Did not perform any FHIR GET request before producing the final answer.
quantity_unit_missing_in_answer: Returned a numeric value without the required unit of measurement.
wrong_resource_type_used_for_medication_: Used an incorrect FHIR resource type for the medication order (e.g., MedicationRequest vs. ServiceRequest).
missing_paired_order_action: Failed to create the additional paired order that the instruction demanded.
placeholder_value_returned_instead_of_re: Returned a sentinel placeholder (e.g., -1) instead of the actual lab value.
missing_observation_post_before_finish: Did not POST a new Observation (e.g., blood pressure) before finishing, despite instruction to record it.
patient_not_found_assumption_without_res: Assumed patient absent and returned 'Patient not found' without verifying search response.
answer_format_extra_explanatory_text: Included extra explanatory sentences beyond the expected concise answer format.
unnecessary_test_order_created: Created a ServiceRequest for a test that was not required by the instruction.
answer_format_wrong_type: Returned answer in an incorrect data type (e.g., a single string when a structured list or object was expected).
